goal: Attempt all remaining future capability tracks without activating unsafe production behavior.
nextRecommendedAction: Wire source/include selected-target dry-run preview into the disabled detail UI and add a temp-fixture guarded live-test executor for non-real config paths.

coreAppShellUiNavigation.evidence: No visible UI change this sprint; existing disabled review surfaces preserved.

configDiscoverySourceAwareModel.evidence: Added source/include selected-target dry-run planner using root path, selected target, source depth, and target preconditions.

safeNormalScalarWrites.evidence: Source/include selected-target dry-run now reuses existing missing/default insertion plan without enabling production source/include writes.

releasePackagingTagArtifacts.evidence: v0.1.0 tag and dist/v0.1.0 artifacts preserved.

missingDefaultInsertion.evidence: Added selected-target source/include dry-run planner for root and sourced temp fixtures; production expansion still blocked.

duplicateResolution.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now models backup/hash/restore gates for duplicate replacement before any live mutation.

highRiskDisplayRecovery.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now requires out-of-band recovery and read-only runtime snapshot before high-risk/display mutation.

structuredFamilyEditorsWrites.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now models reversible structured-write prerequisites; production structured writes remain disabled.

profileModeSwitching.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now requires recorded symlink targets before profile switching.

runtimeReloadIntegration.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now requires read-only runtime snapshot before any runtime mutation.

hyprland0554Migration.evidence: Controlled live-test guard now requires a trusted versioned data bundle before migration activation.

priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeInsertionTargetSelectionUi: implemented_but_disabled: detail-pane review surface shows root config, candidate target files, selected target state, readiness state, and disabled planned target actions; source/include insertion remains blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.duplicateProductionApproval: implemented_but_disabled: production approval gate and precondition fingerprint model exist; confirmation-gated safe-env replacement wrapper exists; production Apply remains blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.structuredFamilyLosslessProof: safe_env_only: hl.bind lossless render and temp-fixture exact-line edit proof exists; production structured writes remain blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.highRiskLiveRecoveryProof: implemented_but_disabled: no-op live readiness protocol exists and refuses real config/runtime mutation; live mutation proof still not run.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeFixtureTargetSelectionProof: safe_env_only: fixture proof requires explicit selected target, blocks no-selection, generated/script-managed, symlink/profile, unknown, duplicate/ambiguous targets, and never enables production insertion.
priorityTrackStatus.disabledDuplicatePreApplyUi: implemented_but_disabled: setting detail duplicate selector now shows pre-Apply approval state, precondition fingerprint, block reason, and disabled confirmation action.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeSelectedTargetDryRunPlanner: safe_env_only: selected root and sourced fixture targets produce exact dry-run insertion previews through the existing missing/default insertion plan; no production source/include insertion is enabled.
priorityTrackStatus.controlledLiveTestGuard: implemented_but_disabled: guard records backup, SHA256, symlink, runtime snapshot, restore, post-restore verification, out-of-band recovery, trusted-data, and explicit live flag requirements before any live mutation.

categoryCoverageThisSprint.coreAppShellUiNavigation: disabled duplicate pre-Apply review UI and source/include target-selection review UI are present with source tests
categoryCoverageThisSprint.configDiscoverySourceAwareModel: source/include selected-target dry-run planner models selected root/source targets and blocked managed/unknown/ambiguous targets
categoryCoverageThisSprint.rowReadWriteModel: future capability tests continue asserting SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS remains 341; no row inventory changed
categoryCoverageThisSprint.safeNormalScalarWrites: selected-target dry-run integrates with the existing missing/default insertion plan but does not write connected files
categoryCoverageThisSprint.releasePackagingTagArtifacts: v0.1.0 tag and dist/v0.1.0 preserved; no release artifact mutation
categoryCoverageThisSprint.missingDefaultInsertion: source/include selected-target dry-run planner added; production source/include insertion remains blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.duplicateResolution: controlled live-test guard added for reversible duplicate replacement prerequisites; production duplicate writes remain blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.highRiskDisplayRecovery: controlled live-test guard added and requires out-of-band recovery before high-risk/display mutation
categoryCoverageThisSprint.structuredFamilyEditorsWrites: controlled live-test guard added for reversible structured write prerequisites; production structured writes remain blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.profileModeSwitching: controlled live-test guard added and requires recorded symlink targets before profile switch mutation
